overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, traveling along an elevated highway through a futuristic neon-lit city, entering a covered tunnel section, and emerging into an open desert highway with mountain views. The footage features high-fidelity ray-traced graphics with a distinct cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with digital billboards

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on elevated highway, maintaining central lane position

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving parallel in adjacent lane

large metal framework spanning highway with directional signs
tall building with vertical white signage reading KIROSHI
large illuminated advertising screen displaying colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: Driving along an elevated urban highway with clear blue skies above. Metal guardrails line both sides while digital billboards and the Kiroshi tower dominate the skyline. Moderate traffic flows in the same direction with a white sedan visible in the right lane.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban highway approaching tunnel portal

events.description: highway narrows approaching large concrete tunnel entrance with overhead gantry

agents.ego_description: continuing highway approach, navigating through moderate traffic toward tunnel

notable_agents.action: gold sedan ahead slowing down approaching tunnel entrance

entered.detail: large concrete tunnel entrance with dark interior opening
yellow and black striped concrete dividers along highway edge

segments.scene_description: Approaching a tunnel portal through dense urban infrastructure. The Kiroshi tower falls behind as the camera moves toward the concrete tunnel entrance. Traffic remains moderate with vehicles slowing for the tunnel transition. Overhead gantries and digital billboards continue to line the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with artificial lighting

events.description: entering tunnel, bright sunlight fades to dim artificial lighting
approaching tunnel exit, bright daylight visible ahead

agents.ego_description: driving through covered tunnel section, maintaining steady speed

smooth concrete wall with horizontal lighting strips
rows of artificial lighting fixtures illuminating the tunnel interior

segments.scene_description: Traveling through a covered highway tunnel with artificial lighting replacing natural daylight. The concrete ceiling and walls enclose the space while tunnel lights create a dim, uniform illumination. Sparse traffic ahead as the vehicle approaches the bright exit portal visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway transitioning to desert outskirts

events.description: exiting tunnel into open landscape with desert mountains visible in distance

agents.ego_description: accelerating on open highway, leaving urban core behind with mountains ahead

notable_agents.action: white sports car overtaking rapidly in the left lane

entered.detail: large arid mountain range visible in the background beyond the highway
elevated highway structure with support columns casting shadows
scattered palm trees lining the highway edge indicating warmer climate

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel into bright sunlight with expansive desert mountains dominating the horizon. The urban density gives way to open highway with scattered palm trees and concrete overpass structures. A white sports car overtakes on the left as the road stretches toward the distant city skyline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive along an elevated urban highway that transitions from an open city skyline into the enclosed mouth of a tunnel. It begins under clear blue skies, gliding past metal guardrails and digital billboards with the Kiroshi tower dominating the distant horizon. As the camera moves forward through moderate traffic, the open vista gradually narrows, and the towering city architecture begins to crowd the periphery. The scene then shifts toward a concrete tunnel portal, with the Kiroshi tower falling behind as the vehicle passes under overhead gantries and enters the dense urban infrastructure.

The shot follows a continuous forward movement from the claustrophobic confines of an artificial tunnel into a vast, sun-drenched desert landscape. It begins within a covered highway section where concrete walls and dim, uniform artificial lighting enclose the vehicle as it approaches a bright exit portal. As the camera passes through this portal, the dim interior abruptly gives way to blinding natural sunlight and an expansive horizon dominated by distant mountains. The scene then opens up into a wide highway flanked by scattered palm trees and concrete overpasses, with a white sports car overtaking on the left. Finally, the road stretches forward toward a distant city skyline, completing the transition from urban enclosure to open wilderness.
